project.name: varunsonline
project.description: Multi-role e-commerce and delivery platform connecting customers, shopkeepers, and delivery agents with real-time order tracking, payments, and subscription management.

nodes.name: User Authentication
nodes.summary: Handles login, phone lookup, OAuth callback, and password management for all user roles (customer, shopkeeper, delivery agent, admin) with lockout tracking and rate limiting.

businessRules: Always return generic error to prevent account enumeration
Lockout check before Supabase auth call to prevent timing oracle
Role-specific lockout thresholds
Phone lookup rate-limited to 10 per minute
crossDomainInteractions: Login tracking writes to profiles table

nodes.name: Order Management
nodes.summary: Full order lifecycle from placement to delivery, including COD and paid orders, cancellations, shopkeeper acceptance/packing, delivery status transitions, OTP verification, and cash collection.

businessRules: Orders have strict state machine transitions
COD orders require OTP verification + cash collection before delivery
Online orders verify Razorpay payment before marking delivered
Rate limit 5 cancellations per minute
Stock deducted atomically via RPC
crossDomainInteractions: Triggers payment processing for COD QR and online orders
Triggers earnings processing for shopkeeper/agent wallets
Sends notifications via FCM to shopkeepers on new orders

nodes.name: Payment Processing
nodes.summary: Razorpay integration for order payments, subscription payments, COD QR payments at delivery, and COD settlement payback from delivery agents to the platform.

businessRules: HMAC signature verification for all Razorpay callbacks
Idempotent webhook processing prevents double-crediting
COD QR settlement requires Razorpay webhook verification before marking delivered
COD cash settlement auto-recovered from future delivery earnings
crossDomainInteractions: Order placement triggers payment order creation
Webhook handler updates order status and activates subscriptions
COD settlement ties into agent wallet balance

nodes.name: Subscription Management
nodes.summary: Shop subscription lifecycle including plan CRUD by admin, subscription purchase by shopkeepers, free subscription grants, and automated expiry checking via cron job.

businessRules: Subscriptions auto-expire via daily cron
Sends reminders 7, 3, and 1 day before expiry
Free subscriptions can be granted by admin with reason codes
New subscriptions extend from current end date (stacking) if active subscription exists
crossDomainInteractions: Payment processing for subscription payments via Razorpay
Admin manages plans in admin panel

nodes.name: Admin Operations
nodes.summary: Back-office management of agents, shops, customers, orders, coupons, withdrawals, and revenue analytics with comprehensive financial reporting.

businessRules: Admin verified via Authorization header or session cookie
Revenue analytics is a read-only aggregation query
Withdrawal processing requires manual admin action
COD settlement oversight tracks all agent dues
crossDomainInteractions: Manages plans used by subscription management
Processes withdrawal requests from wallet domain

nodes.name: Wallet and Payouts
nodes.summary: Manages earnings distribution, wallet balances, and withdrawal requests for shopkeepers and delivery agents with fraud prevention and COD settlement auto-recovery.

businessRules: Max 5 withdrawals per week per user (resets Monday)
Withdrawable balance = wallet_balance - pending_cod_due
Auto-recovery of COD dues from future delivery earnings
Immediate wallet deduction on withdrawal request with rollback on failure
Rate limit 3 withdrawal requests per hour
crossDomainInteractions: Earnings processing triggered by order delivery
Withdrawal requests reviewed and processed by admin
COD settlement payback via Razorpay updates wallet

nodes.name: Login
nodes.summary: Authenticates users via email/phone and password across all roles (customer, shopkeeper, delivery, admin) with lockout detection and login attempt tracking.

nodes.name: Phone Lookup
nodes.summary: Resolves phone number to email by querying the profiles table with rate limiting (10 lookups/minute).

nodes.name: Auth Callback
nodes.summary: Handles OAuth redirect callback from Supabase Auth, exchanges authorization code for session.

nodes.name: Place COD Order
nodes.summary: Creates a Cash-on-Delivery order with server-side validation of products, pricing, delivery radius, and coupon application, then inserts order items and deducts stock.

nodes.name: Place Paid Order
nodes.summary: Creates an order with online payment, validates customer identity, address ownership, shop subscription, delivery radius, product availability, and pricing before inserting the order with 'payment_pending' status.

nodes.name: Cancel Order
nodes.summary: Cancels an order if it's in a cancellable state, with automatic Razorpay refund initiation for online payments and idempotent status transition.

nodes.name: Shopkeeper Order Action
nodes.summary: Enables shopkeepers to accept, reject (with stock restoration), or pack orders with strict state machine validation.

nodes.name: Delivery Status Update
nodes.summary: Advances delivery order status through the state machine (agent_assigned → picked_up → out_for_delivery → delivered) with strict validation and earnings processing on delivery.

nodes.name: Delivery Verify OTP
nodes.summary: Verifies the delivery OTP presented to the customer at delivery, with max 3 attempts lockout. For COD orders, marks OTP verified without delivering; for online orders, marks delivered immediately.

nodes.name: Collect COD Cash
nodes.summary: Handles COD payment collection at delivery time via cash or QR, creates settlement ledger entries for cash payments, processes earnings, and tracks agent COD dues.

nodes.name: Create Payment Order
nodes.summary: Creates a Razorpay payment order for online order payment, COD QR collection, or subscription purchase with amount validation and access control.

nodes.name: Verify Payment
nodes.summary: Verifies Razorpay payment signature using HMAC-SHA256, then updates order status to 'payment_confirmed' and records payment details.

nodes.name: Handle Razorpay Webhook
nodes.summary: Processes Razorpay payment.captured webhook events for subscription activation/renewal, online order confirmation, and COD QR payment verification, with idempotency and FCM notifications.

nodes.name: COD Settlement Payback
nodes.summary: Allows delivery agents to pay back COD cash owed to the platform via Razorpay, including creating a settlement order and verifying the payment to update wallet balance.

nodes.name: Admin Manage Plans
nodes.summary: Full CRUD for subscription plans (create, read, update, delete) with admin authentication.

nodes.name: Purchase Subscription
nodes.summary: Creates a Razorpay order for shop subscription payment, initiated by the shopkeeper for their shop.

nodes.name: Grant Free Subscription
nodes.summary: Admin grants a free subscription to a shop with reason tracking (promotion, manual_approval, testing, etc.), creates subscription record without payment.

nodes.name: Cron Check Subscriptions
nodes.summary: Daily cron job that deactivates expired subscriptions, sends expiry reminders (7/3/1 day before), and resets weekly withdrawal counters on Monday.

nodes.name: Admin Manage Coupons
nodes.summary: Full CRUD for discount coupons: list, create, update (toggle active, modify terms), and delete with admin authentication.

nodes.name: Admin Manage Withdrawals
nodes.summary: Lists and processes withdrawal requests from shopkeepers and delivery agents, with admin authentication.

nodes.name: Admin Revenue Analytics
nodes.summary: Provides comprehensive revenue analytics including order metrics, customer payment breakdown, agent/shopkeeper earnings, subscription revenue, and P&L summary.

nodes.name: Admin Manage Users
nodes.summary: View and manage delivery agents, shopkeepers, shops, and customers with detailed profiles, order history, and performance stats.

nodes.name: Request Withdrawal
nodes.summary: Allows shopkeepers and delivery agents to request a withdrawal from their wallet with fraud prevention checks: balance validation, weekly limit, pending withdrawal, rate limiting, and COD settlement hold.

nodes.name: Process Earnings
nodes.summary: Internal flow that credits shopkeeper and delivery agent wallets upon order delivery, with auto-recovery of agent COD dues from earnings.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.summary: Parse request body, validate password presence, resolve email from phone if needed.

nodes.name: Check Account Lockout
nodes.summary: Check if the account is locked before attempting authentication to prevent timing oracles.

nodes.name: Supabase Authenticate
nodes.summary: Authenticate with Supabase using email and password via signInWithPassword.

nodes.name: Handle Failed Login
nodes.summary: Record failed login attempt with IP, user agent, role, and failure reason for audit tracking.

nodes.name: Handle Successful Login
nodes.summary: Reset failure counters, update last_login timestamp, return success response.

nodes.name: Rate Limit Check
nodes.summary: Verify the caller hasn't exceeded 10 phone lookups per minute.

nodes.name: Query Profile by Phone
nodes.summary: Look up the user profile by phone number to retrieve associated email.

nodes.name: Exchange Auth Code
nodes.summary: Exchange the OAuth authorization code for a session via Supabase.

nodes.name: Validate Authentication
nodes.summary: Extract and verify Bearer token, authenticate user, verify customer role.

nodes.name: Verify Address and Shop
nodes.summary: Verify the customer owns the address, the shop is active and approved, and subscription is valid.

nodes.name: Check Delivery Radius
nodes.summary: Calculate distance between shop and delivery address, reject if outside configured radius.

nodes.name: Verify Pricing and Stock
nodes.summary: Fetch products from DB, verify availability, calculate server-side subtotal and delivery charge.

nodes.name: Apply Coupon
nodes.summary: Validate coupon code, calculate discount server-side using coupon rules.

nodes.name: Create Order and Items
nodes.summary: Insert order record with recalculated financials, insert order items, record status history, increment coupon usage.

nodes.name: Deduct Stock
nodes.summary: Atomically decrement product stock quantities via RPC with fallback to direct UPDATE.

nodes.name: Notify Shopkeeper
nodes.summary: Send push notification to the shop owner about the new COD order.

nodes.name: Rate Limit Check
nodes.summary: Verify the customer hasn't exceeded 5 order placements per minute.

nodes.name: Validate Authentication and Role
nodes.summary: Authenticate via Bearer token, verify user is a customer with proper role.

nodes.name: Validate Request and Entities
nodes.summary: Verify required fields, address ownership, shop active/approved status, subscription validity, and delivery radius.

nodes.name: Verify Products and Pricing
nodes.summary: Fetch products from DB, verify availability, stock, shop ownership, and calculate server-side pricing.

nodes.name: Calculate Financials and Apply Coupon
nodes.summary: Compute delivery charge based on distance, validate and apply coupon, calculate all financials via recalcOrder.

nodes.name: Create Order and Items
nodes.summary: Insert order with payment_pending status, insert order items, deduct stock, record status history, increment coupon usage.

nodes.name: Rate Limit Check
nodes.summary: Verify the customer hasn't exceeded 5 cancellation requests per minute.

nodes.name: Verify Ownership and Status
nodes.summary: Authenticate customer via session cookie, verify the order belongs to the customer, check it is in a cancellable state.

nodes.name: Atomic Cancel
nodes.summary: Atomically update order status to cancelled with race condition protection via status filter.

nodes.name: Process Refund
nodes.summary: Initiate Razorpay refund for online payment orders, update payment_status to refunded.

nodes.name: Verify Shopkeeper Auth
nodes.summary: Authenticate the shopkeeper and verify they own the shop via verifyShopkeeper.

nodes.name: Validate Order and Action
nodes.summary: Fetch order, verify shop ownership, validate state machine transition for accept/reject/pack.

nodes.name: Restore Stock on Reject
nodes.summary: Increment product stock quantities when a shopkeeper rejects an order.

nodes.name: Update Order Status
nodes.summary: Persist the new status (shop_accepted, rejected, order_packed) and record status history.

nodes.name: CSRF and Rate Limit Check
nodes.summary: Validate request origin for CSRF protection and check rate limit (20/min).

nodes.name: Verify Agent and Ownership
nodes.summary: Authenticate delivery agent and verify the order is assigned to them.

nodes.name: Validate State Transition
nodes.summary: Ensure the status transition follows the strict state machine (agent_assigned->picked_up->out_for_delivery->delivered).

nodes.name: Persist Status and Process Earnings
nodes.summary: Update order status with timestamps, record history, process wallet earnings on delivery.

nodes.name: CSRF and Rate Limit Check
nodes.summary: Validate request origin and enforce 10 OTP verifications per minute.

nodes.name: Verify Agent and Order
nodes.summary: Authenticate delivery agent, fetch order, verify assignment, check not already delivered or verified.

nodes.name: Validate OTP
nodes.summary: Compare entered OTP against stored delivery_otp with max 3 attempts lockout.

nodes.name: Mark Delivered or OTP Verified
nodes.summary: For COD: mark OTP verified (await cash collection). For online: mark delivered immediately and process earnings.

nodes.name: CSRF and Rate Limit Check
nodes.summary: Validate request origin and enforce 10 collection attempts per minute.

nodes.name: Verify Agent and Order
nodes.summary: Authenticate delivery agent, verify order is COD, agent is assigned, OTP is verified, and order is out_for_delivery.

nodes.name: Handle QR Payment
nodes.summary: Set order to cod_pending status awaiting webhook verification for QR payments.

nodes.name: Handle Cash Collection
nodes.summary: Atomically mark order delivered, process earnings, create COD settlement ledger entry, update agent pending dues, record wallet transaction.

nodes.name: Rate Limit Check
nodes.summary: Verify the requester hasn't exceeded 10 payment requests per minute.

nodes.name: Verify Authentication
nodes.summary: Authenticate user via Bearer token and verify identity.

nodes.name: Validate Amount and Access Rights
nodes.summary: Validate the amount is positive, verify order ownership (customer) or agent assignment (COD QR), ensure amount matches order total.

nodes.name: Create Razorpay Order
nodes.summary: Create a Razorpay order with amount, currency, receipt, and notes for webhook correlation.

nodes.name: Verify Razorpay Signature
nodes.summary: Compute HMAC-SHA256 signature from order_id and payment_id, compare using timing-safe comparison.

nodes.name: Update Order Status
nodes.summary: Update order to payment_confirmed status, store payment IDs, verify order ID match for security.

nodes.name: Verify Webhook Signature
nodes.summary: Compute and compare HMAC-SHA256 signature of the raw request body using the Razorpay webhook secret.

nodes.name: Process Subscription Payment
nodes.summary: Handle subscription activation/renewal: validate plan, check idempotency, compute start/end dates, deactivate old subs, create new subscription, activate shop, send FCM notification.

nodes.name: Process Order Payment Confirmation
nodes.summary: Confirm online order payment: update order status to payment_confirmed, record payment IDs, send FCM to shopkeeper.

nodes.name: Process COD QR Payment
nodes.summary: Handle COD QR payment at delivery: mark order delivered, verify payment, process earnings, record transactions, send FCM notifications.

nodes.name: Create Settlement Order
nodes.summary: Authenticate agent, check pending COD balance, create Razorpay order for settlement payback.

nodes.name: Verify Settlement Payment
nodes.summary: Verify Razorpay payment signature, check idempotency, update agent wallet balance (reduce debt), log settlement transaction.

nodes.name: List Plans
nodes.summary: Fetch all subscription plans ordered by creation date with admin auth.

nodes.name: Create Plan
nodes.summary: Create a new subscription plan with name, description, type, pricing, and duration.

nodes.name: Update Plan
nodes.summary: Update an existing subscription plan's fields.

nodes.name: Delete Plan
nodes.summary: Delete a subscription plan by ID with a sentinel ID guard.

nodes.name: Create Razorpay Subscription Order
nodes.summary: Authenticate shopkeeper, verify shop ownership, create Razorpay order with subscription notes.

nodes.name: Verify Admin and Validate Input
nodes.summary: Authenticate admin, validate shopId, planId, and grant reason against allowed values.

nodes.name: Verify Shop and Plan Exist
nodes.summary: Confirm the shop and subscription plan exist in the database.

nodes.name: Create Free Subscription
nodes.summary: Deactivate old subscriptions, create new free subscription record, activate shop, record payment history.

nodes.name: Verify Cron Secret
nodes.summary: Validate the CRON_SECRET authorization header.

nodes.name: Deactivate Expired Subscriptions
nodes.summary: Find and deactivate expired shop subscriptions, deactivate associated shops, notify shopkeepers via FCM.

nodes.name: Send Expiry Reminders
nodes.summary: Send push notification reminders to shopkeepers 7, 3, and 1 day before subscription expiry.

nodes.name: Reset Weekly Withdrawal Counters
nodes.summary: Reset weekly withdrawal counters for delivery agents and shops on Monday.

nodes.name: List Coupons
nodes.summary: Fetch all coupons ordered by creation date with admin authentication.

nodes.name: Create Coupon
nodes.summary: Create a new discount coupon with code, discount type/value, min order, max discount, validity.

nodes.name: Update Coupon
nodes.summary: Update coupon fields including toggle active status, modify discount terms.

nodes.name: Delete Coupon
nodes.summary: Delete a coupon by ID with sentinel ID guard.

nodes.name: List Withdrawal Requests
nodes.summary: Fetch all withdrawal requests with user details for admin review.

nodes.name: Process Withdrawal
nodes.summary: Admin approves or rejects a pending withdrawal request.

nodes.name: Verify Admin Access
nodes.summary: Authenticate admin via Authorization header or session cookie, check admin role or email match.

nodes.name: Aggregate Financial Metrics
nodes.summary: Run parallel queries for orders, payments, subscriptions, wallets, and settlements to compute revenue, costs, and P&L.

nodes.name: Build Analytics Response
nodes.summary: Organize computed metrics into order analytics, customer breakdown, agent/shopkeeper stats, admin P&L, trends, and subscription plan revenue.

nodes.name: List Agents
nodes.summary: List all delivery agents with order counts and performance stats.

nodes.name: View Agent Detail
nodes.summary: Fetch full delivery agent profile including documents, orders delivered, and performance stats.

nodes.name: View Shop Detail
nodes.summary: Fetch full shop details including owner info, products, orders, and subscription status.

nodes.name: View Customer Detail
nodes.summary: Fetch customer profile with order history.

nodes.name: Validate Input and Auth
nodes.summary: Authenticate user via Bearer token, validate required fields, payment method details, and user type.

nodes.name: Rate and Duplicate Check
nodes.summary: Enforce 3 withdrawal requests per hour limit and check no pending withdrawal already exists.

nodes.name: Check Balances and Fraud Prevention
nodes.summary: Fetch user balance and pending COD dues, verify withdrawable balance, check account not blocked, validate weekly limit (5/week).

nodes.name: Lock Funds and Create Request
nodes.summary: Immediately deduct withdrawal amount from wallet, create withdrawal request record, rollback on failure.

nodes.name: Check Duplicate Processing
nodes.summary: Verify earnings have not already been processed for this order to prevent double-crediting.

nodes.name: Credit Agent with Auto-Recovery
nodes.summary: Credit agent's delivery earnings to wallet, auto-recover pending COD dues from earnings, update settlement ledger.

nodes.name: Credit Shopkeeper Earnings
nodes.summary: Credit 100% of subtotal to shopkeeper's wallet, update total earnings and order count.

edges.description: Order placement triggers Razorpay payment order creation and webhook confirmation
Order delivery triggers earnings processing for shopkeepers and delivery agents
Razorpay webhook processes subscription payments and activates/renews shop subscriptions
Admin manages subscription plans and grants free subscriptions to shops
Admin reviews and processes withdrawal requests from shopkeepers and delivery agents
Admin views order details, manages COD settlements, and oversees all order activity
Authenticated users (customers, shopkeepers, delivery agents) participate in order lifecycle
COD settlement payback from delivery agents updates wallet balances
